On paper, the pitch of an effete fish out of water kid trying to survive public school isn't that different from Young Sheldon, and that show lasted a zillion seasons. text: Still not watching this until it's over & the consensus is that the finale is good, not being burnt again.
label: hot_take

text: I thought Season 1 was perfect. Instead, we raced through a decade or more and are now trying to spread out a breakneck paced civil war that reads as bing-bang-boom. Season 2 was awful
label: analysis

text: It just annoys me because S1 was really good and I genuinely think the cast is great.

text: My biggest issue with the show is its complete lack of consistency. At some point, I stopped getting invested in new storylines and gave up on the show somewhere in season 2 because the show seemed determined to abandon them before they went anywhere.
label: analysis

text: I am sure this is the best season of HOTD and an improvement on the 2nd season in every way. However it is insane to say that it will ever eclipse the peak of Game of Thrones. Those four seasons were undeniably one of the greatest TV shows ever made.
label: analysis

text: I learned more about the familial relationship between Baelor, Maekar, Daeron, Aerion and Aegon in a few minutes of screentime than I did with the characters in House of the Dragon Season 2 in hours of screentime.

text: Forgive me if I have trust issues with GoT universe and this kind of hype. I've been burnt enough.

text: Bombastic almost literally means dazzling spectacle but shallow and it's like the entire English-speaking world has forgotten this.
